name: scriptorium-cowork
description: Research-direction-and-literature-review plugin for Claude Cowork. For graduate students, doctoral researchers, and anyone with a topic but no question yet: grills the idea into shape, generates a defensible research question, runs the literature review with a PRISMA audit trail, and ships a synthesis you could defend in committee. Optionally turns the finished review into a NotebookLM podcast, slide deck, or mind map. Connector-agnostic — works with whatever scholarly search and document store you've connected.
